overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a foggy, orange-hued dystopian city street at night. The scene features large illuminated billboards, monumental concrete architecture, and scattered pedestrians in a thick atmospheric haze.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a sidewalk next to large illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard showing a woman with a gun and text about 2nd Amendment rights
large advertisement showing a man holding a glass of water with 'REAL WATER' text
tall concrete wall with horizontal lines and weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow sidewalk flanked by a tall building wall covered in massive illuminated billboards. The camera moves forward past advertisements for 'Budget Arms' and 'Real Water' while the street opens up ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction on the debris-strewn sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with monumental concrete arches

events.description: exits covered billboard walkway into open plaza with massive concrete arch structures visible through the haze

agents.ego_description: crossing the street through an intersection while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the intersection in various directions

entered.detail: massive monumental concrete archway structure towering in the foggy distance
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights
large industrial structure with metal scaffolding and platforms

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the billboard corridor, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by massive concrete arches in the distance. The camera crosses the asphalt street through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing parked cars and traffic lights while industrial buildings loom through the orange haze on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict industrial street with debris and overgrown vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through a neglected industrial area with debris scattered across the ground

entered.detail: large green metal industrial door or container wall with rust stains
scattered trash and overgrown weeds on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a derelict industrial street where the ground is littered with debris and patches of overgrown vegetation. A large green industrial structure passes by on the right as the massive concrete arches fade into the fog behind. Sparse pedestrians are visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with overhead truss and palm trees

events.description: emerges from industrial debris area into wider street with palm trees and overhead metal truss structure with red lights

agents.ego_description: walking through a moderately busy street with palm trees and overhead red neon lights

notable_agents.action: tattooed pedestrian in blue tank top walking toward camera

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible through the haze in the distance
large metal truss structure spanning overhead with red warning lights
tall metal scaffolding structure against the building

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up to a wider street lined with palm trees and dominated by a massive overhead metal truss with red lights. The camera moves through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing a tattooed pedestrian in a blue tank top. Industrial buildings and scaffolding line the sides while vehicles are parked along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley between high walls

events.description: turns into a narrower alley with enclosed walls and fewer pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow alley following a lone figure visible in the foggy distance

notable_agents.action: lone figure walking away in the foggy distance ahead

entered.detail: tall concrete wall of industrial building close on the left side
tall concrete wall of industrial building close on the right side
utility poles with wires stretching along the alley

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrow industrial alley enclosed by high concrete walls on both sides. The space feels more confined as the palm trees and overhead structures disappear behind. A lone figure walks ahead in the foggy distance, and utility poles line the left side of the derelict street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian city, transitioning from a narrow corridor of glowing advertisements into a wide industrial district before closing in a confined alley. It begins on a debris-strewn sidewalk flanked by massive illuminated billboards for Budget Arms and Real Water, moving forward as the path opens into a wide urban intersection. As the camera crosses the asphalt street, the scene expands toward monumental concrete arches and industrial buildings looming through a thick orange haze. The movement then proceeds through a derelict street littered with vegetation and passing a large green structure, before opening up again to a wider road lined with palm trees and a massive red-lit overhead metal truss. Finally, the camera turns away from the open street and into a narrow industrial alley, where high concrete walls and utility poles enclose the view as a lone figure disappears into the fog.
